inputs.label: Number of Hives
inputs.businessContext: Total number of active beehives in the apiary.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of active beehives in the apiary.

inputs.label: Frames per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Number of frames per hive, typically 10 for Langstroth.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of frames per hive, typically 10 for Langstroth.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kovan başına çerçeve sayısı, Langstroth için tipik olarak 10.

inputs.label: Honey per Frame
inputs.businessContext: Average honey yield per fully capped frame.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average honey yield per fully capped frame.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamamen sırlanmış çerçeve başına ortalama bal verimi.

inputs.label: Extraction Loss
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of honey lost during extraction and filtering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of honey lost during extraction and filtering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyon ve filtreleme sırasında kaybedilen bal yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Price per kg
inputs.businessContext: Selling price per kilogram of honey.

businessContext_i18n.en: Selling price per kilogram of honey.

inputs.label: Cost per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Annual operational cost per hive (feed, maintenance, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operational cost per hive (feed, maintenance, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kovan başına yıllık işletme maliyeti (yem, bakım vb.).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
